title: CodeGrind: AI-assisted DSA practice meets cyberpunk Code Breach
summary: Showcase CodeGrind's AI-assisted problem solving, real-time editor, and the Code Breach cyberpunk redesign with a focus on learning throughput and customization.
core_message: CodeGrind blends LeetCode-style challenges with an Azure OpenAI assistant, real-time code execution, and a cyberpunk Code Breach visual layer to visualize programming concepts as interactive towers.
cta: Try a guided DSA challenge with AI help now and explore the Code Breach tower defenses in-action.
visual_brief: Short demonstration video: 1) split screen of problem prompt, 2) live coding with syntax highlighting, 3) AI assistant guidance pane, 4) gameplay view showing Code Breach towers visualizing a problem solution, 5) quick UI tour of new features and sign-in flow

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
